title: pinus nigra var. calabrica
intro: Pinus nigra var. calabrica, also known as the Italian stone pine, is a variety of evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Pinus nigra var. calabrica include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve respiratory health, and reduce stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of Pinus nigra var. calabrica include essential oils, extracts, and infusions that can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine.
